massugu = straight   ex.Massugu ikimasu. (Go straight.)
みぎ   migi = right   ex.Migi desu. (It's to the right.)
ひだり   hidari = left   ex.Hidari ni magarimasu. (Turn left.)
asoko = over there   ex.Toire wa asoko desu. (Toilet is over there.)
acchi = that way   ex.Acchi desu. (That way.)
kocchi = this way   ex.Kocchi desu. (This way.)
うしろ ushiro = behind
きた   kita = North   ex.Kita xe massugu ikimasu. (Go straight north.)
ひがし   higashi = East   ex.Higashi ni eki ga arimasu. (Station is east.)
みなみ   minami = South   ex.Minami e ikimasu. (Go south.)
にし   nishi = West   ex.Nishi desu ka? (Is it west?)
